summary: Comprehensive backend testing of SignLanguage Pro API. All 13 pytest tests passed (100%). Verified health, dictionary (list + filters by q/language + languages endpoint), text-to-sign with Gemini 3 Pro (returns id/text/language/summary/steps with hands/mouth/expression/body), video translation (real Gemini call on synthetic black mp4 returned structured response and persisted), and history CRUD (list sorted desc with no _id leak, delete by id, clear all, delete-nonexistent gracefully returns deleted:0).

minor.issue: Always returns 200 even when item doesn't exist (deleted:0). Consider returning 404 for not-found semantics. Non-blocking.

Persists a history record before validating that AI returned usable steps. If Gemini returns malformed JSON, _parse_json fallback yields empty fields but the call still saves a 'text-to-sign' history entry with translated_text equal to the input text. Acceptable but worth noting.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it is referenced inside translate_video (logger.exception). On the first hit before the module-level logging.basicConfig executes (it does at import time, so OK in practice), but stylistically logger should be initialized near the top before route definitions.

server.py: get_history converts created_at strings back to datetime in a loop after the DB call; safe but adds latency for large lists. Consider storing as native BSON datetime instead of isoformat strings to avoid the dual conversion.

server.py: translate_video stores doc['created_at'] as ISO string while get_history expects to convert it back. This works but is inconsistent with TranslationItem model which declares datetime. Recommend storing as datetime in Mongo and removing the isoformat() cast.
server.py: SEED_DICTIONARY is defined in-module (~120 lines). For maintainability extract dictionary data to a JSON file under backend/data/.
server.py: No request size limit / file size validation on /api/translate/video. A user could upload a multi-GB file. Add a max-bytes guard before passing to Gemini.
server.py: text_to_sign always sets confidence='alta' regardless of AI output quality. Consider deriving from the parsed response or making nullable.
Missing data-testid attributes review skipped (frontend testing not requested).
seed_data_creation: Generated /tmp/test_video.mp4 (black 1-2s mp4 via ffmpeg) for video-upload tests. Test history entries created during runs are cleaned up via DELETE /api/history at end of test_clear_history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and run cleanly with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. ffmpeg has been installed in the container (apt). Gemini 3 Pro via emergentintegrations is operational and responds to both text-to-sign and video endpoints. Tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. AI calls take ~5-15s each so total run is ~70s.
